title: Contentstack Stack
description: Schema representing a Contentstack stack, which is an independent content repository within an organization. Stacks contain all content types, entries, assets, environments, and configuration for a digital experience project.

api_key.description: The unique API key that identifies this stack. Used as the primary authentication credential for Content Management and Content Delivery API requests.

uid.description: Internal unique identifier for the stack.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the stack.

description.description: Optional description of the stack's purpose and contents.

master_locale.description: The default locale code for the stack. All content must have a version in the master locale before it can be localized to other locales.

org_uid.description: UID of the organization that owns this stack.

plan_id.description: Identifier of the Contentstack subscription plan for this stack.

created_by.description: UID of the user who created the stack.

updated_by.description: UID of the user who last modified stack settings.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the stack was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the stack settings were last updated.

version.description: Version number of the stack settings configuration.

rte_version.description: Version of the rich text editor used in this stack.

blockEditorExperience.description: Indicates whether the block editor experience is enabled for this stack.

locales.description: List of locale codes enabled for this stack.
